title: Happy Ghast / Ghastlings
description: adds the Happy Ghast / Ghastlings shown at minecraft live
body:
**_Welcome to a remake of the Happy Ghasts / Ghastlings, This mod adds all 3 features shown at minecraft live for 1.21.6 to minecraft now so you can playtest them even earlier than snapshots 

 

What the mod includes:

Happy Ghasts - A new ghast that is passive and can be ridden by 4 players, you can also stand on the happy ghast, to ride one you need to craft yourself a harness, when riding the happy ghast to make it move you need to be holding snowballs

 

Ghastlings - A baby version of the happy ghast, this mob can be fed with snowballs to grow it up quicker, this version cant be ridden

 

Dried Ghast - A new block that can be crafted with 1 ghast tear and 6 bone blocks, when placed in water the ghast will slowly turn happy and after about 20 mins it will hatch into a ghastling 

 

Harness - Only comes in 1 colour (could change in the future) you can equip it onto a happy ghast to ride them and they are crafted with 2 glass, 1 wool and 3 leather_**

 

Video Showcase - [Showcase](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7PYq3cH3uE)
